caption: A product page for a sports card break is displayed, featuring a basketball card of Stephen Curry from the "2020-21 PANINI OBSIDIAN BASKETBALL FOTL 1ST OFF THE LINE 1-BOX BREAK #5 *RANDOM DIVISION*". The card is encased in a black border with "OBSIDIAN" and "STEPHEN CURRY" printed on it. The price is listed as "$99.99" above an "ADD TO CART" button. Detailed text below explains the break's rules, stating, "8 spots. Everyone gets a random division in the NBA on all cards shift!" and "Each Box contains Two Autographs and Two Inserts or Parallels!". To the right of the product listing, a sidebar features the "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" logo and "JASPYSBREAKS" repeated. At the bottom of the screen, a red banner encourages viewers to "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a "Subscribe" button. The image remains completely static across all frames, showing no movement or changes in the visual content.
